meaning: adj.有硬壳的,顽固的,脾气暴躁的
examples: Crusty whole wheat bread is my favorite.
Such, at any rate, is the view of crusty Saudi conservatives.
Obviously not in physical formats like CDs, and probably not in already-crusty formats like paid downloads.
"Bob was a Democrat, a crusty veteran of Texas politics and my great friend, " Bush said.
At the same time crusty competitors Interstate Bakeries and Sara Lee instigated a price war.
